title: galium commune proles alpestre
intro: Galium commune proles alpestre, also known as Alpine Bedstraw, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and alkaloids, which have been reported to have several health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and improving sleep quality, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Alpine Bedstraw is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and has been traditionally used to treat various conditions, including digestive issues and menstrual cramps.
